title: Better icons!
description: The resource pack that replaces the HUD. All icons are made in the style of version 1.14+
body:
# **NEW ICONS!!!**
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2cd1ff022dbc014cc474822723a7deff7a28bec.png)
#  ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ**NOWAY!!!**
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09ee2f356aeb8ac99be0d33d075736fa359dbc4e.png)
#  ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ**SPECIAL VERSION!**
[Special version](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-icons/version/IeXgmTAk) for the [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) mod.
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c56d70f500e4da3f531b1df71fd6be3c2c71af17.png)

### ["The original page of the resource pack."](https://minecraft-inside.ru/resource-packs/135379-better-icons.html) We agreed on everything, don’t worry.
